title: StylexStyle
description:
God this took a long time to make
I wanted to make some decent visuals for a change, I'm  pretty happy with the result

The base video and the song are from the High School DxD ending
You can watch it here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vTgT-mGwuQA

Pretty good anime, recommended if you love boobs like I do
